body.note: Japanese needs more line-height than Latin (1.4-1.5)

lineBreak.note: Enables kinsoku shori (禁則処理). Prevents CJK punctuation at line start/end.

wordBreak.note: Prevents breaks within CJK words. Use with overflow-wrap: break-word.

palt.note: Proportional alternate widths. Tightens spacing for headings. Use on h1-h3.

kern.note: Kerning. Usually enabled by default. Explicit declaration for safety.

mixedTypesetting.note: When mixing Japanese and Latin in the same line, Latin font should come FIRST in font-family declaration.
mixedTypesetting.reason: Browser picks first font that has the glyph. Latin fonts don't have CJK glyphs, so they fall through to JP font for CJK characters.
